query: Quick morning setup. Turn on kitchen light 1 in the kitchen so the counters are bright. Also turn on bathroom light 1 in the bathroom so I can get ready.

steps.thought: I need to find the device ID for the kitchen light 1. I will get the devices in the kitchen room.
I need to find the device ID for the bathroom light 1. I will get the devices in the bathroom room.
I have identified the kitchen light as 'kitchen_on_off_light_1'. I will now turn it on using the OnOff cluster.
I have identified the bathroom light as 'bathroom_on_off_light_1'. I will now turn it on using the OnOff cluster.
Both the kitchen light and the bathroom light have been successfully turned on. The task is complete.

action_input.answer: I have turned on the kitchen light 1 and the bathroom light 1.
